task_completion.description: Generate the NACA 4415 airfoil in QBlade
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade interface showing 'NACA 4415' in the airfoil list, foil design module, or generation dialog.

task_completion.description: Apply a trailing edge gap of 2.0% with 80% blending distance
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade trailing edge modification dialog or settings showing a gap thickness of 2% (or 0.02) and a blending distance of 80% (or 0.8) applied to the airfoil.

task_completion.description: Export the modified airfoil to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager showing the file 'naca4415_bluntTE.dat' being saved to or existing in the '/home/ga/Documents/airfoils/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the exported file is in standard .dat format
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'naca4415_bluntTE.dat' shown in a text editor or terminal, displaying a header line followed by two columns of x,y coordinate pairs.

integrity.description: Agent used the QBlade GUI to generate and modify the airfoil
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QBlade graphical interface, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to generate the airfoil.

integrity.description: Agent exported the file using QBlade's export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The file save dialog originates from QBlade, proving the file was generated by the software and not downloaded or copied from elsewhere.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually type or copy-paste coordinates into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open a blank text file and paste pre-computed airfoil coordinates to bypass the QBlade generation and modification steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target airfoil is NACA 4415 (15% thickness). The required trailing edge gap is 2.0% (0.02) of chord with an 80% (0.8) blending distance. The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/naca4415_bluntTE.dat. The .dat file should contain a header line followed by at least 30 x,y coordinate pairs.
